data.title: RED: Write structural tests for S6 residual callers polyglot changes
data.description:
## testing_mode: RED

Write RED structural tests for the S6 changes.

## Tests to add (tests/scripts/test-residual-callers-polyglot.sh — new file)

1. test_validate_phase_no_cfg_required_for_format: validate-phase.sh must NOT contain _cfg_required for commands.format, commands.format_check, or commands.lint (grep assertion)
2. test_validate_phase_warns_when_format_check_absent: structural check that validate-phase.sh contains a [DSO WARN] path for absent commands.format_check
3. test_validate_phase_guards_run_check_calls: validate-phase.sh guards CMD_FORMAT_CHECK and CMD_LINT run_check calls with non-empty check
4. test_format_and_lint_has_intentionally_python_only_comment: format-and-lint.sh must contain a rationale comment (e.g., 'intentionally Python-only' or 'pre-commit: Python files only')
5. test_pre_commit_format_fix_has_intentionally_python_only_comment: pre-commit-format-fix.sh must contain same rationale comment

## Files to create/modify
- tests/scripts/test-residual-callers-polyglot.sh (new)

## Acceptance criteria
- All 5 tests added, RED (fail) before implementation tasks run
- Tests use structural grep assertions
- Tests pass after Tasks 2 and 3
